mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, age, gender, diabetes_type AS diabetesType, diagnosis_timeframe AS diagnosisTimeframe, created_at AS createdAt FROM health_profiles WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_profiles (user_id, age, gender, diabetes_type, diagnosis_timeframe, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{diabetesType}, #{diagnosisTimeframe}, NOW())
